name: Green Beans with Fermented Black Beans and Po
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp fermented black beans, rinsed and drained
1 lb Chinese green beans, trimmed and blanched
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mash the black beans with garlic and ginger.
2. Heat oil in a large wok or saute pan. Cook pork, stirring occasionally until no pink remains (about 10 minutes).
3. Add mashed fermented beans and stock to the pork. Mix together and cook for 2 minutes.
4. Add green beans to the mixture. Cook for an additional 3 minutes.
5. In a bowl, mix soy sauce with 2 tablespoons water and cornstarch until forming a paste.
6. Stir the cornstarch mixture into the liquid in the wok while tossing to coat the beans.
7. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if needed.
